mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient preserves font inputs whose comparison operands approach the values guarding GPOS table parsing, ratcheting toward the structural state that sets the GPOS-attachment scratch flag; naive lacks this gradient and vpc's added I2S overhead does not improve on plain VP.
one_line: VP gradient ratchets toward deep GPOS structural state via CMP milestones

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs whose comparison operands incrementally approach the syntactically valid bracketed-SELECT shape, preserving partial-match mutants until a '[...]' token is assembled; naive lacks CMP feedback and vpc's added I2S stage does not help, confirming CMP_MAP gradient as the enabling mechanism.
one_line: VP gradient assembles bracketed SQL identifier token to satisfy '['=='[' check

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient feedback over VDBE integer/string comparisons rewards mutants that move comparison operands closer to matching, building the valid relational SQL expression needed to dispatch OP_Le; naive has no such gradient and vpc's I2S stage adds overhead without benefit.
one_line: VP gradient incrementally builds relational SQL to reach OP_Le VDBE dispatch

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards inputs whose parser-token and operator comparisons move closer to matching, preserving partially-valid comparison expressions that lead to the TK_LE switch arm; naive lacks this gradient and vpc's I2S stage regresses, so the enabling technique is CMP_MAP gradient.
one_line: VP gradient assembles valid comparison expression to reach TK_LE switch arm

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient preserves inputs with operator diversity (>=, <=, -, /) whose intercepted CMP operand pairs inch toward the rare true branch threshold; losers concentrate on repeated digit/operator bytes that never cross the threshold, and vpc's substitution stage counterproductively diverts mutation from the gradient.
one_line: VP gradient rewards operator diversity to nudge CMP pair across rare threshold
